query:
UPDATE tachyon_apps_compute.deployments SET
            status = ?, cloud_run_service_name = ?,
            cloud_run_revision = ?,
            pages_project_name = ?,
            pages_deployment_id = ?,
            url = ?,
            public_url = ?,
            scaling_min_instances = ?,
            scaling_max_instances = ?, scaling_cpu = ?,
            scaling_memory = ?, scaling_concurrency = ?,
            updated_at = ?
            WHERE id = ?
